rationale.R1.2: Identifies a potential issue with the claim of novelty compared to existing work.
rationale.RX.1: Does not differentiate uncertainty levels for different claims made in the text.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions, but there is some drift towards discussing broader implications of the work.

rationale.RX.5: Does not provide any information about the sources or reasons behind the claims made.
